channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INDINFRA] India Infraspace Submits Q1 FY26 Unaudited Financial Results
item.description:
India Infraspace Ltd has submitted its unaudited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2025. GM CA& Co. Chartered Accountants conducted a limited review of these results, confirming their preparation in accordance with Indian Accounting Standard 34 and compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The consolidated results incorporate the performance of its subsidiary, Shaurya Castings Pvt Ltd. The auditors' report indicates no material misstatement in the accompanying financial statements.

  • India Infraspace submitted Q1 FY26 unaudited financial results.
  • Results cover the quarter ended June 30, 2025.
  • GM CA& Co. provided a limited review report.
  • Report confirms compliance with SEBI regulations and Ind AS 34.
  • No material misstatement found in the financial statements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: India Infraspace Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MANGALAM] Mangalam Drugs: Promoter Aditya Dhoot releases 89,225 pledged shares
item.description:
Mangalam Drugs & Organics Ltd has received a revised disclosure from promoter Aditya Ramniwas Dhoot regarding the release of pledged shares. A total of 89,225 equity shares, constituting 0.56% of the company's total share capital, have been released from encumbrance. These shares were previously pledged as security for debt with M/s Famycare Private Ltd. Following this release, the promoter's holding of encumbered shares in Mangalam Drugs & Organics Ltd is now 0.00%. This action reduces the overall promoter share encumbrance.

  • Promoter Aditya Dhoot released 89,225 pledged shares.
  • This represents 0.56% of Mangalam Drugs' total share capital.
  • Shares were previously pledged as security for debt.
  • Post-release, promoter's encumbered holding is 0%.
  • Reduction in promoter share encumbrance is a positive sign.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANGALAM DRUGS & ORGANICS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [NOIDATOLL] Noida Toll Bridge Reconstitutes TCWG with KMPs
item.description:
Noida Toll Bridge Company Ltd has announced the re-constitution of its 'Those Charged With Governance' (TCWG) committee. The TCWG members, at their meeting on April 27, 2026, approved the induction of Key Managerial Personnels (KMPs) as new members. This recommendation was subsequently approved by the company's Board of Directors via a circular resolution on April 28, 2026. The re-constituted TCWG now includes Mr. Nand Kishore as Chairman & Nodal Officer, along with Mr. Kazim Raza Khan, Mr. Rakesh Chatterjee, Ms. Jayashree Ramaswamy, Mr. Sharad Goel, Mr. Dheeraj Kumar, Mr. Gagan Singhal, and Mr. Amit Agrawal as members. This move aims to strengthen the governance structure by integrating key management perspectives.

  • Noida Toll Bridge re-constituted its TCWG committee.
  • Key Managerial Personnels were inducted as new members.
  • Board of Directors approved the re-constitution on April 28, 2026.
  • The move aims to strengthen corporate governance structure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NOIDA TOLL BRIDGE COMPANY LTD. | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [COLINZ] Colinz Labs Submits Q4 & FY26 Integrated Financial Filing
item.description:
Colinz Laboratories Ltd has submitted its Integrated Financial Filing for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This submission is in compliance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/-POD-2024/185 dated December 31, 2024, and BSE Circular No. 20250102-4. The filing includes Annexure A for Financial Results, while other annexures related to deviation, default on loans, related party transactions, and audit qualifications were marked as not applicable to the company. The integrated filing will also be made available on the company's website.

  • Colinz Laboratories submitted Integrated Financial Filing for Q4 and FY26.
  • Filing covers the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Submission is as per SEBI and BSE regulatory circulars.
  • Includes Financial Results Annexure A.
  • Other annexures like RPT, deviation, default, audit impact are not applicable.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COLINZ LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ZENOTECH] Zenotech FY26 Net Loss ₹107.21 Lakhs; Q4 Net Loss ₹315.08 Lakhs
item.description:
Zenotech Laboratories Ltd. announced its audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved these results, and an unmodified auditor's opinion was declared. For the fourth quarter of FY26, the company reported a total income of ₹1,047.71 lakhs and a net loss of ₹315.08 lakhs, with basic earnings per share (EPS) of (₹0.52). For the full financial year 2026, Zenotech recorded a total income of ₹4,592.26 lakhs and a net loss of ₹107.21 lakhs, resulting in a basic EPS of (₹0.18). Revenue from operations for Q4 FY26 was ₹886.50 lakhs, while for the full year FY26, it was ₹3,956.20 lakhs.

  • Zenotech reported Q4 FY26 net loss of ₹315.08 lakhs.
  • Full year FY26 net loss stood at ₹107.21 lakhs.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue from operations was ₹886.50 lakhs.
  • FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹3,956.20 lakhs.
  • The company received an unmodified auditor's opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZENOTECH LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RNITAI] Rnit Ai Solutions Board approves Q4 & FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Rnit Ai Solutions Ltd's Board of Directors, at their meeting on April 29, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. These results were recommended by the Audit Committee and include the Independent Auditor's Reports with an unmodified opinion. The approved financial information is also accessible on the company's official website.

  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Results cover the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Independent Auditor's Report provided an unmodified opinion.
  • The Audit Committee recommended the financial results for approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rnit Ai Solutions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ARCHIDPLY] Archidply Board to meet on May 8 to approve FY26 results
item.description:
Archidply Industries Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Friday, May 08, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the audited financial results for both the quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026, on a standalone and consolidated basis. Additionally, the company reiterated that the trading window for its securities remains closed until 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results, in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 8, 2026.
  • To approve audited Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Trading window closed until results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARCHIDPLY INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NORTHARC] Northern Arc Board to meet May 8 for Q4 FY26 results & fundraise
item.description:
Northern Arc Capital Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Friday, May 8, 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider raising funds through the issuance of Debt Securities via private placement, subject to shareholder approval. The trading window for the company's securities will remain closed until May 10, 2026, 48 hours after the financial results announcement.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 8, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 FY26 and full-year audited financial results.
  • Board will also consider raising funds via debt securities through private placement.
  • Fund-raising is subject to shareholder approval.
  • Trading window closed until May 10, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Northern Arc Capital Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PARSHVA] Parshva Enterprises Board Meeting on May 6, 2026
item.description:
Parshva Enterprises Ltd has announced that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled to be held on May 6, 2026. The board will convene to consider and approve various matters, though the specific agenda items beyond the initial point are not detailed in the provided filing.

  • Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026.
  • The meeting is to consider and approve various matters.
  • Specific agenda items were not fully disclosed in the filing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parshva Enterprises Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ABLBL] Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands Discloses NCDs, New Listing & Redemption
item.description:
Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands Ltd (ABLBL) has provided disclosures regarding its Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) as per SEBI regulations. The company listed 50,000 NCDs (INE14LE08014) of ₹1 lakh face value each on BSE on March 20, 2026, which received a 'CRISIL AA+ Stable' rating. Additionally, 50,000 NCDs (INE647O08115), transferred from Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Limited, were fully redeemed on January 30, 2026, for ₹500 crore. The interest payment of ₹33.97 crore (net of taxes) for these redeemed NCDs was also made on the same date. The earlier rating for the redeemed NCDs was 'CRISIL AA Positive' and 'India Ratings & Research AA Positive'.

  • ABLBL listed 50,000 new NCDs (INE14LE08014) on BSE on March 20, 2026.
  • New NCDs received a 'CRISIL AA+ Stable' rating on March 5, 2026.
  • 50,000 NCDs (INE647O08115) were fully redeemed on January 30, 2026.
  • ₹500 crore was redeemed for the matured NCDs.
  • Interest payment of ₹33.97 crore was made for the redeemed NCDs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands Ltd | Category: Loan & Debt
